name: Baked Orzo with Peppers and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 2 teaspoons salt to boiling water and add orzo; cook for 10 to 12 minutes until tender, then drain.
2. Place the orzo in a lightly buttered dish with peppers, chilies, and Monterey Jack cheese.
3. Spread sour cream evenly over the top, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, and dot with small pieces of butter.
4. Bake at 450 degrees for 15 minutes on the top shelf of the oven until golden and puffy. Cool slightly.
